title: JSON Output
description: Return the result in a small JSON shape.
body: Return valid JSON only. Use exactly this schema: { "text": string }. Always return a single JSON object, even when no edits are needed. The `text` value must contain only the final result text. If translation is active, `text` must contain only the final target-language result. Do not wrap the JSON object in markdown, code fences, quotes, or explanations. Do not include extra keys such as `input`, `target`, `source`, or `language`.
